task.title: How to use the Review Activity Trend Report to find specific information?

How does the trend of various clarification metrics such as Total Clarifications Sent, Clarification Sent, Clarification Rate, Encounter Clarification Rate, Financial Impact Clarification, Other Impact Clarification look like at an organization level and at a specific facility level?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Trend tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last three calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the KPI Summary tabular report.
step.stepresult: This report displays the trend of various clarification metrics such as Total Clarifications Sent, Clarification Sent, Clarification Rate, Encounter Clarification Rate, Financial Impact Clarification, and Other Impact Clarification for the selected time period at an organization level.

step.cmd: To analyze the data for a specific facility, select the facility from the Facility filter.
step.stepresult: The KPI Summary tabular report now displays data for the selected facility.

task.title: How does the trend of total reviews for Medicare cases look like at an organization level and at a specific facility?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Trend tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last three calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the KPI Summary tabular report.
step.stepresult: The tabular report displays the trend of various review metrics such as Initial Reviews, Additional Reviews, Total Reviews, Total Review Objective, and Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hrs.) for the selected time period.

step.cmd: Select the Medicare from the Payer filter to analyze the trend of reviews for the Medicare cases at the organization level.
To analyze the data for a specific facility, select the facility from the Facility filter.
Alternatively, go to Reviews by Month and Payer graph and click on the Medicare legend or line.
step.stepresult: The Reviews by Month and Payer chart displays the trend of Medicare cases for the selected facility and time period.

task.title: How does the trend of total reviews look like for a specific CDS?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Trend tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last three calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Reviews by Month and CDS chart.
step.stepresult: The chart displays the count of total reviews for each CDS.

step.cmd: To analyze the trend of initial or additional review, select either the Initial Review or Additional Review from the Review Type filter.
step.info:
The Reviews by Month and CDS chart helps you to analyze the following:
Best CDS performer in terms of total reviews, initial reviews, additional reviews.
Trend of reviews for Medicare cases (or Managed Medicare, Medicaid, any other payer) for each CDS. To analyze this, select ‘Medicare’ from the payer filter.
Karen is new to the team. She joined the team six months back. Has she come up to speed with her team mates? Analyze review trend for Karen and compare with other CDSs in the team.

task.title: How does the trend of average initial review TAT for Medicare cases looks like for a specific CDS?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Trend tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last three calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Select required CDS from the CDS filter and select Medicare from the Payer filter.
Analyze the KPI Summary tabular report.
step.stepresult: The report displays the trend of average initial review TAT in hours for Medicare cases reviewed by the selected CDS in the selected time period.
